attacking_style: Insufficient data to determine specific attacking patterns. Evidence shows early-race aggression capable of capturing KOM jersey, but no repeated attack profiles documented.
team_tactics: No consistent team support patterns observed across the limited race sample. Appears to operate independently in breakaway scenarios.
terrain_preference: Demonstrated ability to compete for KOM classification in multi-stage mountainous races, but lacks the physical resilience to defend or capitalize on such efforts over multiple days.
vulnerability: Critical weakness in multi-day race durability. Cramping issues emerge under accumulated fatigue (50km to go), leading to race abandonment even when holding classification jerseys. Cannot sustain efforts required to defend gained positions.
key_patterns: Cramping under multi-day fatigue stress, documented at 50km from finish while defending jersey.
Unable to complete stage races despite early success: abandoned Dauphiné while holding mountains classification.
Physical limitations emerge mid-race week, preventing capitalization on early-stage breakaway success.
form_trajectory: negative: Both 2023 observations show physical breakdown under stage race stress, abandoning Dauphiné despite holding KOM jersey—signals insufficient grand tour readiness or recovery capacity
